nodes.name: validate_data.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point script to validate dataset integrity, supporting YOLO annotations and video source validation before training.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses argparse for CLI argument parsing and Pathlib for robust path manipulation.

nodes.name: parse_args
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments including paths to images, labels, videos, and options for class count and duplicate check.

nodes.name: _merge
nodes.summary: Merges two ValidationReport objects by aggregating counts, lists of invalid elements, and duplicate information.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main orchestration function that parses CLI args, triggers dataset/video validation, merges results, and prints the final report.

nodes.name: data_validation.py
nodes.summary: Core data validation library containing utility classes and functions to verify images, YOLO annotations, and video files.
nodes.languageNotes: Leverages opencv-python (cv2) for image/video verification and hashlib for file hashing.

nodes.name: ValidationReport
nodes.summary: A dataclass representing the state of dataset validation, keeping track of image/label counts, errors, and unreadable items.

nodes.name: _check_video
nodes.summary: Validates a video file using OpenCV, verifying it can be opened and reading metadata like width, height, FPS, and frame count.

nodes.name: validate_videos
nodes.summary: Scans a directory of video files and returns a ValidationReport detailing valid and unreadable videos.

nodes.name: _parse_yolo_line
nodes.summary: Parses and validates a single YOLO annotation line, checking field counts, data types, class index bounds, and bounding box ranges.

nodes.name: validate_dataset
nodes.summary: Performs dataset validation by checking image/label pairing, image readability, duplicate MD5 hashes, and parsing YOLO format annotations.

nodes.name: print_report
nodes.summary: Formats and displays a comprehensive visual summary of the dataset and video validation report in the terminal.

nodes.name: test_data_validation.py
nodes.summary: Pytest-based test suite verifying the dataset validation helpers, YOLO label parsing logic, and video validation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pytest framework with tmp_path fixture for isolated file-system testing.

nodes.name: test_validate_dataset_happy_path
nodes.summary: Tests dataset validation on a valid setup with one image and its corresponding correct YOLO label.

nodes.name: test_validate_dataset_missing_label
nodes.summary: Tests dataset validation behavior when an image has a missing label file, ensuring it is reported in the ValidationReport.

nodes.name: planner.py
nodes.summary: Provides base interface for collision avoidance and path planning based on observed object tracks.

nodes.name: tracker.py
nodes.summary: Defines the standard data representation of tracks and the base tracking interface used to associate detections across frames.

nodes.name: test_tracking.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for validating tracker data structures, such as verifying default track initialization values.

nodes.name: BaseAvoidancePlanner
nodes.summary: Base class defining the planning interface for collision avoidance, requiring subclasses to implement a track-based planning algorithm.

nodes.name: Track
nodes.summary: A dataclass representing a tracked object, holding state properties like identifier, bounding box, velocity, and age.

nodes.name: BaseTracker
nodes.summary: Base class defining the tracking interface, requiring implementations to update object tracks based on current detections.

nodes.name: test_track_default_velocity
nodes.summary: Validates default values of velocity and age when a Track object is instantiated.

nodes.name: lint.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that lints Python files in the repository on push and pull request events using Black and Flake8.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses actions/checkout@v4 and actions/setup-python@v5 to check out code and set up Python 3.12, running black and flake8 command-line tools.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: The main project overview and entry point documentation for CPV301 - Drone Obstacle Avoidance (RT-DR-003). It presents the primary research question regarding dynamic obstacle avoidance, shows the directory tree layout for data, models, notebooks, reports, scripts, src, and tests, provides setup instructions with python virtual environments, details command examples to run the demo, train models, evaluate weights, run pytest, and outlines the automated formatting and linting CI process.

nodes.name: CODEOWNERS
nodes.summary: Configures repository-wide code review ownership, assigning @its-dreOwO as the reviewer for all files.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Defines folder and file exclusion patterns to skip during Understand-Anything structural and semantic code analysis.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder configuration file to ensure the processed data directory is tracked in Git.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder configuration file to ensure the raw data directory is tracked in Git.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder configuration file to ensure the sample data directory is tracked in Git.

nodes.name: SU26_AI2013_CPV301.xlsx
nodes.summary: The CPV301 course syllabus and project rubric spreadsheet containing grading metrics and round-by-round project milestones.

nodes.name: training_pipeline.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive architectural specification and phase roadmap for the 5-class obstacle detector model training pipeline.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Main pipeline entry point that handles video source parsing and feeds frames to the tracking and visualization loops.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Bootstraps and runs the demo obstacle avoidance pipeline loop using OpenCV frame capture and tracking visualizer.

nodes.summary: Placeholder configuration file to ensure the models directory is tracked in Git.

nodes.name: evaluate.py
nodes.summary: CLI utility script that evaluates fine-tuned YOLO or RT-DETR model weights against a designated test dataset.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking src/ as a top-level absolute-importable Python package.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking src/avoidance as an importable subpackage within the drone obstacle avoidance codebase.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking src/detection as an importable subpackage within the drone obstacle detection codebase.

nodes.name: detector.py
nodes.summary: Defines dataclass structures and base classes for drone-based obstacle detectors.

nodes.name: Detection
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a 2D bounding box detection with its bounding box coordinates, confidence score, class ID, and class name.

nodes.name: BaseDetector
nodes.summary: Abstract base detector class establishing the standard detect method interface returning a list of Detections.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking src/tracking as an importable subpackage within the drone object tracking codebase.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking src/utils as an importable subpackage within the drone obstacle avoidance codebase.

nodes.name: visualizer.py
nodes.summary: Utility functions for drawing tracking boxes and labels on video frames.

nodes.name: draw_tracks
nodes.summary: Draws bounding boxes and tracker IDs on video frames for visualizing drone object tracks.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Initialization file marking tests/ as an importable test suite package.

nodes.name: test_detection.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests verifying detection field initialization and property integrity.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Developer instructions and guidance file for Claude Code in the CPV301 (Computer Vision) course project (RT-DR-003: Drone Obstacle Avoidance). It covers the project context, lists essential setup/run/train/evaluate/test/lint commands, describes the core three-stage CV pipeline (detection, tracking, avoidance planning) with its Base classes and concrete subclasses, specifies model comparison choices (YOLOv8n, YOLOv8m, RT-DETR-L), tracks current pipeline status, and outlines coding conventions such as the 88-character line limit.

nodes.name: flake8_results.txt
nodes.summary: Static lint analysis report containing five E501 line-too-long style violations (exceeding the configured 88-character limit). The violations are located within the geometric planner implementation and the Kalman multi-object tracker implementation.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Configuration file for the Black python code formatter. Specifies a line length of 88 characters, targets Python versions 3.10 through 3.12, and excludes directories such as .git, .venv, build, dist, notebooks, and CPV_notes from being formatted.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Core package dependency manifest for the CPV301 project. Specifies versions for essential OpenCV image processing, PyTorch and Torchvision deep learning, Ultralytics YOLOv8 object detection, FilterPy and SciPy tracking algorithms, data visualization tools (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Pandas), scikit-learn, and developer utilities such as Black, Flake8, and Pytest with coverage tracking.

nodes.name: setup.cfg
nodes.summary: Configuration manifest specifying settings for Flake8 linting and Pytest unit testing. Sets the Flake8 max-line-length to 88, ignores spacing/formatting compatibility rules (E203, W503) for Black, and ignores temporary/dependency directories. Configures Pytest to run tests in the tests folder and generate term-missing coverage reports for the src package.

nodes.name: rtdetr.yaml
nodes.summary: Hyperparameter and model settings for RT-DETR-L, a transformer-based real-time object detector utilized as an accuracy ceiling and architectural contrast in the pipeline.

nodes.name: visdrone5.yaml
nodes.summary: Dataset configuration for VisDrone-DET, defining the root directories and mapping the original 10 classes to 5 coarse classes for simplified model training.

nodes.name: yolov8m.yaml
nodes.summary: Model and training settings for YOLOv8m (medium capacity), serving as the primary sweet-spot detector for the drone avoidance system.

nodes.name: yolov8n.yaml
nodes.summary: Model and training settings for YOLOv8n (nano capacity), providing a high-speed baseline and embedded performance floor.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder file used to ensure Git tracks and preserves the gitignored processed training and validation dataset folder.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder file used to ensure Git tracks and preserves the gitignored raw VisDrone dataset folder.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Placeholder file used to ensure Git tracks and preserves the directory containing sample videos for test and manual validation runs.

nodes.name: implementation_plan.md.resolved
nodes.summary: Completed roadmap outlining concrete integration plans for detection, tracking, and geometric avoidance control modules.

nodes.summary: Placeholder file used to ensure Git tracks and preserves the gitignored model weights checkpoint folder.

nodes.name: preprocess.py
nodes.summary: Data preparation script that maps the VisDrone 10-class dataset into 5 coarse classes and generates stratified 70/15/15 splits.

nodes.name: train.py
nodes.summary: Model training orchestrator that initializes a YOLO model and triggers training using Ultralytics with custom config yaml parameters.

nodes.name: parse_args
nodes.summary: Parses dataset directories, split ratios, and random seeds for the VisDrone preprocessing run.

nodes.name: dominant_coarse_class
nodes.summary: Heuristic function that finds the most common 5-class target class in a YOLO annotation file to use for dataset stratification.

nodes.name: collect_samples
nodes.summary: Finds and returns matching image and label files from the raw training, validation, and dev-test splits.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Prepares and executes the stratification split, copies files, and writes remapped annotations to processed directories.

nodes.name: parse_args
nodes.summary: Parses custom parameters including configuration file, training epochs, CUDA device, and data directory override.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates config loading, dynamic dataset path rewriting, model instantiation, and triggers training through Ultralytics YOLO API.

nodes.name: yolo_detector.py
nodes.summary: YOLO-based object detector implementation utilizing the Ultralytics framework for real-time video frame object detection.

nodes.name: kalman_tracker.py
nodes.summary: Kalman Filter-based multi-object tracking implementation, associating detections across video frames with constant velocity models.

nodes.name: geometric_planner.py
nodes.summary: Geometric obstacle avoidance planner calculating drone yaw and altitude adjustments to avoid tracked dynamic obstacles.
